content:
I've been tracking calories for 2 years and every TDEE calculator I used asked for my email or pushed a premium plan. So I built my own.

FreeTDEE.com calculates your daily calorie needs using the Mifflin-St Jeor formula. Pick your activity level, get your maintenance, cutting, and bulking targets instantly.

No app. No account. Data stays in your browser's localStorage. Built with Next.js + Cloudflare Pages in ~3 hours using AI.
